suppress.notes: alpha, sadece iç telemetri, saldırı yüzeyi değil; stabil sürümde düşecek
Logback aktif logger; log4j-api sadece transitive, ulaşılamaz

CVE is currently matched against Kotlin stdlib artifacts by broad JetBrains CPE. This Java service only receives Kotlin transitively through OkHttp/OpenTelemetry; stdlib is pinned to the current managed version and should be rechecked when JetBrains publishes a narrower advisory or fixed coordinate.

DOMPurify 3.4.0 bundled inside swagger-ui (via springdoc). Supersedes the prior 3.3.2 rule: swagger-ui was bumped and now ships DOMPurify 3.4.0, which closed the old CVEs (41238/41239/41240) but carries new IN_PLACE-mode XSS findings — CVE-2026-49458 (Moderate), CVE-2026-49459, CVE-2026-49978 (Low) plus aliased GHSAs — all below the CVSS 7 gate. DOMPurify's version is controlled by swagger-ui, not pinned here, and no swagger-ui/springdoc release ships a patched DOMPurify yet. Mitigated: swagger-ui disabled outside dev profile, so no production attack surface. Re-check at Q3 review / on next springdoc upgrade.
